subject: docs(claude): declare DEBUG_SYSTEM + DOWNLOAD_PDF + TIMER_LEAKS + HTTPS_PROXY in Adopted Patterns
body:
Pattern-audit follow-up: the Adopted Patterns section covered only 7 of
glow-props' 11 patterns explicitly. Four patterns were implemented in
code (or correctly N/A) but undocumented in the table.

Added three "implemented" sections:

- DEBUG_SYSTEM — already shipped across src/utils/debugLog.ts +
  src/components/common/DebugPill.tsx. Declaration covers: typed
  numeric id for stable React keys + dedup, (string & {}) source
  fallback, HMR-guarded global listeners, subscriber replay + per-
  listener isolation, 3-method clipboard fallback, separate React
  root for stylesheet-failure resilience.

- DOWNLOAD_PDF — already shipped via PdfPreview.tsx + index.css @media
  print rules + pdfVerifications.ts for the 12-char verification code.
  Declaration covers: no external PDF lib, no server round-trip, the
  print:text-gray-* / print:text-black overrides (already documented
  in the Hardcoded-color exceptions table), theme-aware print path.

- TIMER_LEAKS — already verified conformant by the `race` audit
  (commit-trail earlier in this session). Declaration inventories
  every timer site (Toast, BurgerMenu, DebugPill, ModuleEditor,
  PwaInstallPrompt, usePWAUpdate, AppLayout), every event listener
  site (Modal, NotificationBell, AppLayout online/offline, hooks),
  every Supabase realtime channel, and both HMR guards
  (__debugLogListenersAttached + PWA singleton equivalent).

Added one "Not Applicable" entry:

- HTTPS_PROXY — targets Node.js scripts behind corporate proxies;
  sun-sea-o is browser-only, so N/A. Revisit only if a Node.js
  build/CI script ever needs proxied external API access.

All 11 glow-props patterns now have an explicit status declaration.
No code changes — documentation only. Tests + lint + tsc still clean.

Tags: docs, alignment, claude-md, pattern-audit
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
